misc: Waters the course more than the course sprinklers.
biography: Pekka is a familiar face at the Hector Trophée, known for his meticulous approach to the game and his even more meticulous watering of the greens, often seen tending to the course with more dedication than the sprinklers themselves.

Hailing from Espoo Ringside Golf, Pekka brings a quiet intensity to the competition. While he is not always the loudest player on the course, his focus is unwavering, and his determination palpable. He has participated in 7 previous Hector Trophée tournaments and is looking forward to his eighth appearance in 2026.

Pekka's dedication bore fruit when he and his teammate secured the Hector Trophée victory one year. Although the Victor Trophy has eluded him thus far, Pekka remains a formidable competitor, and his fellow golfers know that he is always a threat to win.
